args.code:
import json, pandas as pd

author_article_ids = {int(r['article_id']) for r in var_call_G3HgQfxojcz8W4qaV298ZNyB}
articles = var_call_1eCPJyafECxANBtJTaDIL5di

df = pd.DataFrame(articles)
df['article_id'] = df['article_id'].astype(int)
df = df[df['article_id'].isin(author_article_ids)].copy()

# Simple keyword-based classifier for the 4 categories using title+description
import re

def classify(text):
    t = (text or '').lower()
    # Sports
    sports_kw = ['nba','nfl','mlb','nhl','soccer','football','basketball','baseball','hockey','tennis','golf','olympic','formula one','f1','cricket','rugby','tournament','championship','coach','player','match','cup','league']
    if any(k in t for k in sports_kw):
        return 'Sports'
    # Business
    biz_kw = ['stocks','shares','wall st','wall street','nasdaq','dow','s&p','earnings','profit','revenue','ipo','merger','acquisition','bank','inflation','economy','economic','oil prices','crude','currency','dollar','euro','market','trade','company','companies','investor','fed','interest rate']
    if any(k in t for k in biz_kw):
        return 'Business'
    # Science/Technology
    sci_kw = ['software','hardware','internet','online','web','google','microsoft','apple','iphone','android','ai','artificial intelligence','robot','space','nasa','satellite','chip','semiconductor','biotech','genome','genetic','virus','vaccine','climate','warming','carbon','physics','astronomy','telescope','technology','tech','scientist','research','study','laboratory']
    if any(k in t for k in sci_kw):
        return 'Science/Technology'
    # World (default for geopolitics/conflict etc)
    return 'World'

df['text'] = (df['title'].fillna('') + ' ' + df['description'].fillna(''))
df['category'] = df['text'].map(classify)

total = int(len(df))
sci = int((df['category'] == 'Science/Technology').sum())
frac = sci/total if total else None

out = {'total_articles_amy_jones': total, 'science_technology_articles': sci, 'fraction': frac}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))
